message:
feat(cli): implement serve command with REST API and web UI

Add HTTP server for interactive data exploration:
- GET / - Embedded HTML UI with SQL editor and results table
- GET /api/schema - Table schema as JSON
- POST /api/query - Execute SQL queries with JSON response
- GET /api/health - Health check endpoint

Features:
- Auto-inject FROM clause for queries without one
- Support for Parquet, Arrow, and Lance file formats
- Cross-platform browser auto-open (--no-open to disable)
- CORS headers for cross-origin requests
- Dark theme UI with keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Enter to run)
